# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Response;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function show(Request $request)
    {
        $url = (string) $request->input('url', '');

        if ($url === '') {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Missing url parameter.'], 422);
        }

        if (!preg_match('~^https?://~i', $url)) {
            $url = 'http://' . $url;
        }

        $result = $this->fetchUrl($url);

        if ($result['error'] !== null) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => $result['error'],
                'details' => $result['details'],
            ], 422);
        }

        $html = $result['body'];
        $preview = $this->buildPreview($url, $html);

        return response()->json([
            'url' => $url,
            'final_url' => $result['effective_url'],
            'status' => $result['http_code'],
            'content_type' => $result['content_type'],
            'preview' => $preview,
        ]);
    }

    public function render(Request $request)
    {
        $url = (string) $request->input('url', '');

        if ($url === '') {
            return response('Missing url parameter.', 422);
        }

        if (!preg_match('~^https?://~i', $url)) {
            $url = 'http://' . $url;
        }

        $result = $this->fetchUrl($url);

        if ($result['error'] !== null) {
            return response('Unable to fetch preview: ' . $result['error'], 422);
        }

        $html = $result['body'];
        $preview = $this->buildPreview($url, $html);

        $title = htmlspecialchars((string) ($preview['title'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $description = htmlspecialchars((string) ($preview['description'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $siteName = htmlspecialchars((string) ($preview['site_name'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $image = htmlspecialchars((string) ($preview['image'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $finalUrl = htmlspecialchars((string) ($result['effective_url'] ?? $url), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $host = htmlspecialchars((string) parse_url($result['effective_url'] ?? $url, PHP_URL_HOST), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

        $imgHtml = $image !== '' ? '<div style="margin-top:10px"><img src="' . $image . '" alt="" style="max-width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:8px" /></div>' : '';

        $out = '<div style="font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;max-width:720px">' .
            '<a href="' . $finalUrl . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">' .
            '<div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px">' .
            '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#6b7280;margin-bottom:6px">' . ($siteName !== '' ? $siteName : $host) . '</div>' .
            '<div style="font-weight:600;font-size:16px;line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:6px">' . $title . '</div>' .
            '<div style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.35;color:#374151">' . $description . '</div>' .
            $imgHtml .
            '</div></a></div>';

        return response($out, 200)->header('Content-Type', 'text/html; charset=UTF-8');
    }

    protected function fetchUrl(string $url): array
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        $headers = [
            'Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8',
            'Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5',
            'Cache-Control: no-cache',
            'Pragma: no-cache',
            'Connection: close',
        ];

        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_HEADER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 5,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 6,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 12,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
            CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
            CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => $headers,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0 (+https://example.com)',
        ]);

        $raw = curl_exec($ch);

        if ($raw === false) {
            $err = curl_error($ch);
            $errno = curl_errno($ch);
            curl_close($ch);

            return [
                'error' => 'cURL error',
                'details' => ['errno' => $errno, 'message' => $err],
                'http_code' => null,
                'content_type' => null,
                'effective_url' => null,
                'body' => '',
            ];
        }

        $headerSize = (int) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HEADER_SIZE);
        $httpCode = (int) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $contentType = (string) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_CONTENT_TYPE);
        $effectiveUrl = (string) curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);
        curl_close($ch);

        $body = substr($raw, $headerSize);
        if ($body === false) {
            $body = '';
        }

        if ($httpCode < 200 || $httpCode >= 400) {
            return [
                'error' => 'Upstream returned non-success HTTP status',
                'details' => ['status' => $httpCode],
                'http_code' => $httpCode,
                'content_type' => $contentType,
                'effective_url' => $effectiveUrl,
                'body' => $body,
            ];
        }

        if ($contentType !== '' && stripos($contentType, 'text/html') === false && stripos($contentType, 'application/xhtml+xml') === false) {
            return [
                'error' => 'Unsupported content type',
                'details' => ['content_type' => $contentType],
                'http_code' => $httpCode,
                'content_type' => $contentType,
                'effective_url' => $effectiveUrl,
                'body' => '',
            ];
        }

        if (strlen($body) > 1024 * 1024 * 2) {
            $body = substr($body, 0, 1024 * 1024 * 2);
        }

        return [
            'error' => null,
            'details' => null,
            'http_code' => $httpCode,
            'content_type' => $contentType,
            'effective_url' => $effectiveUrl,
            'body' => $body,
        ];
    }

    protected function buildPreview(string $inputUrl, string $html): array
    {
        $doc = new \DOMDocument();
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        $encoding = $this->detectEncoding($html);
        if ($encoding !== null) {
            $html = mb_convert_encoding($html, 'HTML-ENTITIES', $encoding);
        }

        $loaded = $doc->loadHTML($html, LIBXML_NOWARNING | LIBXML_NOERROR | LIBXML_NONET);
        libxml_clear_errors();
        libxml_use_internal_errors(false);

        $title = '';
        $description = '';
        $image = '';
        $siteName = '';

        if ($loaded) {
            $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);

            $title = $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:title')
                ?? $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:title')
                ?? $this->nodeText($xpath, '//title')
                ?? '';

            $description = $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:description')
                ?? $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:description')
                ?? $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'name', 'description')
                ?? '';

            $image = $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:image')
                ?? $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:image')
                ?? $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'name', 'twitter:image:src')
                ?? '';

            $siteName = $this->firstMeta($xpath, 'property', 'og:site_name')
                ?? '';

            $baseHref = $this->firstAttr($xpath, '//base[@href]', 'href');
            $resolveBase = $baseHref ?: $inputUrl;

            if ($image !== '') {
                $image = $this->resolveUrl($image, $resolveBase);
            }
        }

        $final = [
            'title' => $this->cleanText($title, 200),
            'description' => $this->cleanText($description, 300),
            'image' => $image,
            'site_name' => $this->cleanText($siteName, 100),
        ];

        if ($final['title'] === '' && $final['description'] === '' && $final['image'] === '') {
            $final['title'] = parse_url($inputUrl, PHP_URL_HOST) ?: $inputUrl;
        }

        return $final;
    }

    protected function detectEncoding(string $html): ?string
    {
        if (preg_match('~<meta[^>]+charset=["\']?([a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+)~i', $html, $m)) {
            return $m[1];
        }

        if (preg_match('~<meta[^>]+http-equiv=["\']content-type["\'][^>]+content=["\'][^"\']*charset=([a-zA-Z0-9\-_]+)~i', $html, $m)) {
            return $m[1];
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function firstMeta(\DOMXPath $xpath, string $attr, string $value): ?string
    {
        $q = sprintf('//meta[translate(@%s, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")="%s"]/@content', $attr, strtolower($value));
        $nodes = $xpath->query($q);
        if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
            $v = trim((string) $nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            return $v !== '' ? $v : null;
        }

        $q2 = sprintf('//meta[translate(@%s, "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ", "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")="%s"]', $attr, strtolower($value));
        $nodes2 = $xpath->query($q2);
        if ($nodes2 && $nodes2->length > 0) {
            $node = $nodes2->item(0);
            if ($node instanceof \DOMElement && $node->hasAttribute('content')) {
                $v = trim((string) $node->getAttribute('content'));
                return $v !== '' ? $v : null;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function nodeText(\DOMXPath $xpath, string $query): ?string
    {
        $nodes = $xpath->query($query);
        if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
            $v = trim((string) $nodes->item(0)->textContent);
            return $v !== '' ? $v : null;
        }
        return null;
    }

    protected function firstAttr(\DOMXPath $xpath, string $query, string $attr): ?string
    {
        $nodes = $xpath->query($query);
        if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
            $node = $nodes->item(0);
            if ($node instanceof \DOMElement) {
                $v = trim((string) $node->getAttribute($attr));
                return $v !== '' ? $v : null;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    protected function cleanText(string $text, int $maxLen): string
    {
        $text = html_entity_decode($text, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        $text = preg_replace('/\s+/u', ' ', $text ?? '');
        $text = trim((string) $text);

        if (mb_strlen($text) > $maxLen) {
            $text = mb_substr($text, 0, $maxLen - 1) . '…';
        }

        return $text;
    }

    protected function resolveUrl(string $maybeRelative, string $baseUrl): string
    {
        $maybeRelative = trim($maybeRelative);
        if ($maybeRelative === '') {
            return '';
        }

        if (preg_match('~^https?://~i', $maybeRelative)) {
            return $maybeRelative;
        }

        if (str_starts_with($maybeRelative, '//')) {
            $scheme = parse_url($baseUrl, PHP_URL_SCHEME) ?: 'http';
            return $scheme . ':' . $maybeRelative;
        }

        $base = parse_url($baseUrl);
        if (!$base || empty($base['host'])) {
            return $maybeRelative;
        }

        $scheme = $base['scheme'] ?? 'http';
        $host = $base['host'];
        $port = isset($base['port']) ? ':' . $base['port'] : '';
        $basePath = $base['path'] ?? '/';

        if (str_starts_with($maybeRelative, '/')) {
            $path = $maybeRelative;
        } else {
            $dir = preg_replace('~/[^/]*$~', '/', $basePath);
            $path = $dir . $maybeRelative;
        }

        $path = $this->normalizePath($path);

        return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $path;
    }

    protected function normalizePath(string $path): string
    {
        $segments = explode('/', $path);
        $out = [];

        foreach ($segments as $seg) {
            if ($seg === '' || $seg === '.') {
                continue;
            }
            if ($seg === '..') {
                array_pop($out);
                continue;
            }
            $out[] = $seg;
        }

        return '/' . implode('/', $out);
    }
}
